chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP NO.D-8341/2018 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with signature of Judge ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 21.09.2021 Mr. Abdus-Salam Memon advocate for petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Arshad Tanoli advocate for respondents No.2 to 4. Mr. Muhammad Nishat Warsi, DAG................ After hearing the parties at length learned counsel for respective parties are agreed that this petition may be disposed of in terms that:- 1. Port Qasim Authority shall remove all officers in lower grade working in higher grade in different cadres as OPS/additional charge/acting charge/allowed to work, preferably within one month. 2. Petitioner and respondent No.5 alongwith their other batch-mates shall be considered for promotion as per their cadre in accordance with relevant Rules and particularly in view of judgment of this court passed in CP No.D-7622/2018 and 6110/2020 as well as judgment of the apex court reported in 2015 PLC (SC) 767. Disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E IK
